# Mutation testing baseline — PR-23 (2026-06-15)
# Generated by: mutmut run --paths-to-mutate src/shenbi/exceptions.py,src/shenbi/logging.py,src/shenbi/gates/shared.py
# Target: 60% mutation score after P-2, 80% after P-3
#
# Status: BASELINE NOT YET ESTABLISHED
#
# `mutmut run` fails during baseline collection because test_g4_fail_no_marker
# invokes shenbi-validate via subprocess. The subprocess invocation breaks
# under mutmut's test isolation (pytest fails when the G4 call returns empty
# stdout). This is a pre-existing subprocess-test fragility, not a regression
# introduced by PR-19 modularization.
#
# Next steps (deferred to a follow-up):
#   1. Investigate mutmut's isolation mode and whether the subprocess test
#      needs `--no-cov` or other flag.
#   2. Alternatively, exclude test_gates_integrity.py from mutmut's test
#      discovery and rely on unit tests that don't shell out.
#   3. Re-run `uv run mutmut run` and capture results below.
#
# Once baseline is established, the format will be:
# src/shenbi/exceptions.py  <total> <killed> <timeout> <suspicious> <skipped>  <score>
# src/shenbi/logging.py     <total> <killed> <timeout> <suspicious> <skipped>  <score>
# src/shenbi/gates/shared.py <total> <killed> <timeout> <suspicious> <skipped> <score>
